description: Extended JCS (RFC 8785) parity fixtures. Each vector is canonicalized identically by the TypeScript implementation in @peac/crypto and the Go implementation in sdks/go/jcs.go.

vectors.description: JCS preserves strings byte-identically; NFC (U+00E9) and NFD (U+0065 U+0301) do not normalize.
Nested object depth 5 with mixed keys; keys sort per JCS at every level.
Zero and negative zero both render as 0 per JCS number serialization.
Integer 1 and float 1.0 both render as 1.
JCS requires escape only for quote, backslash, and U+0000 through U+001F.
Non-BMP character U+1F600 encoded via surrogate pair; JCS emits UTF-8 bytes.
